framework.name: Omni-Chain Trading for Interoperability
framework.description: Planned capability to trade tokens and NFTs across different blockchains. Reduces friction in cross-platform transactions. Could be analogous to agent interoperability — allowing agents built on different frameworks to discover and transact with each other through a coordination layer.
framework.raw_quote: Then there's this omni chain trading thing, which basically just means making it easier to trade your tokens and NFTts across different blockchains.
